chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 770 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.5446/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.5155/2025 (R/Surety) 30.09.2025 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed G. Ansari, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application has been filed by applicant Sarmad Ali Panhyar seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Muhammad Ishaque and Muhammad Afzal were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 23.10.2024 subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing two original special savings certificates of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 21.11.2024. Subsequently, the accused have been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 30.05.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
